user_query: I need to update my document types in the 360 Business Tool. Please provide me with the latest document types available. Also, fetch the cases modified since last month. Additionally, I would like to search for the lyrics of the song 'Bad' by Michael Jackson using the Chart Lyrics API.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest document types available in the 360 Business Tool.
Fetch the cases modified since last month.
Search for the lyrics of the song 'Bad' by Michael Jackson using the Chart Lyrics API.
